title: About BTC Seer
description: AI-powered Bitcoin analysis and trading platform

features.title: Features
features.predictionsDesc: Multi-timeframe forecasts using ensemble of 4 ML models
features.signalsDesc: Actionable buy/sell signals with entry, target, and stop-loss
features.onChainDesc: Whale tracking, exchange flows, and network metrics
features.newsDesc: Real-time news aggregation with AI sentiment analysis
features.paperTradingDesc: Practice trading with $10k virtual funds and real data
features.advisorDesc: AI-powered trade suggestions with risk management
features.elliottDesc: Wave pattern analysis with Fibonacci targets
features.powerLawDesc: Bitcoin fair value model based on adoption growth

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: BTC Seer is an educational tool. Nothing in this app constitutes financial advice. AI predictions may be inaccurate. Always do your own research (DYOR) before making any investment decisions. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

credits.title: Credits
credits.builtWith: Built with React, Python, and love for Bitcoin
credits.poweredBy: Powered by multiple AI models and real-time market data
